headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Fifth Third Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $61
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NYSE:FITB) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $60 to $61.
